# /pr-bots-review

## Purpose
Iterate on bot feedback until the published PR is ready for human review.

## When To Use
After a PR exists and automated review bots can inspect the diff.

## Required Contracts
- `pr-bot-iteration` - Bot feedback loop artifacts are normalized and traceable

## Next Commands
- `/review-cycle`
- `/final-review`
